de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl

Class ExecutionMethodCall

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.AbstractExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model.impl.ExecutionMethodCall
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    IExecutionElement, IExecutionMethodCall, IExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>

    public class ExecutionMethodCall
extends AbstractExecutionNode<MethodBodyStatement>
implements IExecutionMethodCall
    The default implementation of IExecutionMethodCall.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel
